fields.description: This work addresses the suffering of childhood, confiend in a world that imposes hunger and fear before it knows the meaning of life. The doll here is not just a toy, but a symbol of a small, helpless body, its mouth sown shut with silence, its eyes closed to hope, and its limbs bound with merciless threads .he heavy brown color in the background encapsulates the weight of suffering.
fields.medium: technique: Watercolor on paper, hand-embroidered threads
fields.title: Threads of Silence

fields.directors_statement: I have always been attracted to understand and better comprehend the lives of people who live marginalized by society, as in this case like prostitutes. In one occasion I have learned from prostitutes who live and work in a really poor neighborhood in downtown of Mexico City, that they are hoping to find real love and they do not allow themselves to feel orgasms with any client  just the ones they feel like: "As this is a business we decide to have something special with someone special" Deep down they harbor the desire to find love with someone stable who loves and accepts them as they are. This is how this little short film came about, which is basically made with a lot of love and respect to them.

fields.directors_statement: Aydan & Evan started from this disconnection I had with myself and my future. While reflecting on this, I was heavily influenced by themes of romance and memory and how they are portrayed in film. From this, I started writing the script, centring the story on my own experience of feeling lost, detached from myself, and how this could be explored through romance. Desire, as well as the memory of desire and how it lingers on your mind, almost obsessively, became the driving force of the story. I wanted the audience to not only feel the desire, but the hope desire brings to the protagonist for a fresh start.
fields.log_line: After a romantic chance encounter, Aydan tries to unravel his feelings for Evan as he obsessively recalls his memories of the night they met.

fields.log_line: Poland today - after the publication of the near total abortion ban regulations. A man and a woman bury a chest on the random field. Meanwhile, the owner of the plot calls the police. The couple is being accused of commiting a crime. As it turns out the chest hides a different secret than the police and the plot's owner suspected. Will the painful confrontation with the emotions and the loss, in addition to the life-changing news be the end or the beginning of a new relationship between the couple?

fields.directors_statement:
The reason why I decided to tell this true family story, is because it symbolizes the lives of millions of women from the same era who were silenced. It describes a society marked by inequality between men and women where they were forced from childhood to assume responsibilities of adulthood. Girls, born into humble families, who did not have access to a basic education, because they had to take care of the housework, work in the fields, or take care of their younger siblings, adopting the role of mothers. Women who suffered sexual abuse throughout their childhood, most at the hands of relatives, and were forced into silence. A time in history, which marked many of our grandmothers and mothers, and which conditioned their way of educating ourselves and seeing the world.
This short film, in each of its scenes, will remind us where we come from, and the long way we still have to travel as women, as a society, and as human beings.
fields.log_line: Sara, a teenager who has suffered from her mother's deep depression and her constant suicide attempts since she was a child, receives the opportunity to travel to the past and experience first-hand with her, the moments that marked her and made her what she is now.

fields.description: Laterns is comprisied of 13 printed (intalgio and relief) works on paper created in New York. They have been digitally reprinted and laminated in Mykonos, transposed onto outdoor laterns in collobration with Lydia Venieri. The 13 laterns illuminate the collobrative and communicative properties of the print medium, and how it can be used to translate and share images and ideas across borders and between people.
fields.title: Laterns, 2023

fields.statement:
Φ is the child of one and two, of the unit and its binary hypostasis.

It is the magical number that never ends: the eternal hermaphrodite, son of Rhea and Cronus, of the sphere and time. The Logos of the Golden Ratio, the eternal division of the genetic amoeba, the dance of the cosmic DNA, the endless fermentation. The greatest Orphic mystery is the Coherence that the celebration gives to the world. By celebrating, Dionysus defeated real armies. The power of Intoxication breaks the limits of restraint and strips man and feelings from Himself, seeking to share Himself: I am the Vine, the bread is our body, the wine is our blood, the dance is our soul united. The unit is divided and reunited in the dance. In the theater, the repeated pantomime of each drama, as roles are projected and cut off from oneself, brings catharsis.

The Orphic Mysteries are not conveyed by logical words but by feelings that reward instinct. They concern the click of a higher sensual knowledge, where the initiates communicate united. Then sadness and joy, mourning and resurrection, feeling and reason become our trial, our unique and indivisible, and panhuman memory.

“Snake, monkey, and eagle
with the great feast
we will finish the ballos” …

Lydia Venieri
Maroussi, May 2023

fields.title: Different Worlds from the Spaces of Places

fields.description:
MOTHERS WOMB
I can't see the light
But I can breathe
For me you put things aright
Can I stay longer please
You carry me all the time
O African woman
What shall I render to recompense in due time
Introduce me to life as a new one
fields.title: Mothers Wombs

fields.title: The "Safe" Hearth

fields.description:
This work addresses the suffering of childhood, confined in a world that imposes hunger and fear before it knows the meaning of life. The doll here is not just a toy, but a symbol of a small, helpless body, its mouth sewn shut with silence, its eyes closed to hope, and its limbs bound with merciless threads. The heavy brown color in the background encapsulates the weight of suffering.
The twisted threads represent the hidden restrictions that deprive children of their most basic rights: food, nourishment, and milk. This enforced silence not only kills the body, but also suffocates the soul, rendering the child a mere
"object" suspended between life and death.
Ultimately, the work poses a painful question:
How many children live today as neglected puppets on the stage of a cruel world?
Technique: Watercolor on paper, hand-embroidered threads.
fields.medium: technique: Watercolor on paper, hand-embroidered threads
fields.title: Multiple Self Threads

fields.description: The cake slowly decays. Its sweetness fading. A slow death, a degradation like the unraveling of reality itself. What we live, what we feel, feels like a dream, like a simulation, proving we are real. But are we? Is this the reality we chose? The layers degrade away, revealing nothing but the hollow core beneath.

fields.title: Mystic Garden

fields.name: Max Brismontier
fields.statement:
I am Max, a 23 years old french artist based in Brussels Belgium. I gratuated of a Political Science Bachelor Degree in 2021 and I am currently doing a master degree in fine arts at the Ecole de Recherche Graphique (ERG).
I like to merge the use of sculpture, textile art, videography, photography, installation and performance. My work revolves around the exploration of folklore and collective imagination and the creation of ephemeral and hidden heterotopias.

fields.title: Sculpture Playground

fields.description:
This time there will be no ark. Not even the Arians will return from Mars. New life will emerge from the sea that covers everything. Beings will emerge from the core of the Earth. Where Eros and Eris are magnetized. In her womb electrically, like lightning, the Amphibian will be conceived. From the fire of the core they will be ejected condensed and as they come to the surface they will be filled with water and air. And when the acceleration will exceed the speed of light they will acquire their visible mass.
Shellfish, flying reptiles,
coral-rocks alive will solidify the five elements again.
The amoebae will be fertilized by the blue flying mushrooms of the bottom. Orchids will nest in the trunks. Everything will be pleasure, and pain even, without fear.
Only nostalgia will remind here and there, stirring the salty seaweed,
hard the Memory.

fields.statement:
This time there will be no ark. Not even the Arians will return from Mars. New life will emerge from the sea that covers everything. Beings will emerge from the core of the Earth. Where Eros and Eris are magnetized. In her womb electrically, like lightning, the Amphibian will be conceived. From the fire of the core they will be ejected condensed and as they come to the surface they will be filled with water and air. And when the acceleration will exceed the speed of light they will acquire their visible mass.
Shellfish, flying reptiles,
coral-rocks alive will solidify the five elements again.
The amoebae will be fertilized by the blue flying mushrooms of the bottom. Orchids will nest in the trunks. Everything will be pleasure, and pain even, without fear.
Only nostalgia will remind here and there, stirring the salty seaweed,
hard the Memory.
fields.title: 9 AMPHIBIAN

fields.statement:
Numbers are akin to wine or narcotics; they intoxicate us. How many souls have vanished in the rooms of Monte Carlo or Las Vegas, mesmerized and lost? Money governs all. It is merely an abstract power, printed paper adorned with countless zeros. Money is god; when nature cries out that the emperor is naked, it simply does not exist.

Nine is a number—a number that the Nuer people, an African tribe, do not count. If you add or subtract nine from a series of numbers, nine remains invisible. Nine is the magnetic spiral. It embodies rhea, a force that assassinates time (chronos) through a divine conspiracy. Just as rhea, the feminine principle, cannot end her own existence while birthing.

Nine will consume all other numbers, devouring both odds and evens. Like an amoeba, it will emerge as the new unit. Nine is the python, which has hibernated for years. Apollo bound it with numbers when time stripped away the sanctuaries of Earth. Yet now we wander toward the sun of eternal night, and the python will stretch, preparing to burrow into the core of the Earth.

From the pain of this world, a ring of tension encircles the nucleus of the Earth. Through internal light, it radiates. In the sea, lightning devours the elements, gaining mass and form. The flames, the water, and the air coalesce into lava. Lava envelops the children, the mountains, nature, and the souls. Into the abyss, the souls gestate within the seed, waiting for the ice age to pass, dreaming.

The spiral, the healing serpent of Asclepius and Imhotep, the thirteenth zodiac, Unuk Elhaija, the Ophiuchus constellation—nine, the amphibian, gestates.

Lydia Venieri
New York, November 2024

fields.description: Boxes with the label “Antidote” have been sent to artists from around the world. The artists will return the boxes with a piece of art inspired by the theme - Antidote. The boxes will be hidden on the sacred island of Delos. A treasure hunt will be organized, where visitors will scatter around the island to find the “treasures”. Our long term goal is to attain the first floating museum - maybe an old war ship- where the artworks of the Mykonos Biennale will be exhibited, the museum of Archipelago.
fields.title: Treasure Hunt - Antidote
